text: I have a fever and a cough.
Can I have a coffee, please?
How do I get to the station?
Good morning! Can I help you?
Yes. Can I have a coffee, please? And how do I get to the station?
Here is your coffee. For the station, go straight and turn left.
Thank you. But I am not well. I have a fever and my head hurts.
Oh, I am sorry. The clinic is on the right. Please rest.
Thank you very much. Have a nice day!
Thank you. Have a nice day!

Hi, this is Estephano. Today is a busy day. In the morning, I go to the store and I buy water and coffee. Then I take the bus to the city. I ask a man: how do I get to the station? He says: go straight and turn left. In the afternoon, I am not well. I am sick and my head hurts. So I call the clinic and I make an appointment. It is a long day, but I do everything in English!

Hello, this is Sara from Better Clinic. I call about your appointment. The weather is cold and rainy today, so please be careful. If you are sick, if you have a fever or a cough, come to the clinic in the morning. Take the subway and get off at the central station. The clinic is on the right. Thank you, and have a nice day!

Estephano has a busy day. First, he goes to the store and buys water. Then he asks a man: how do I get to the station? Next, the man says: go straight and turn left. After that, Estephano feels sick, so he calls the clinic. Finally, he makes an appointment with the doctor.
Can I have a coffee, please?
How do I get to the station?
I have a fever and my head hurts.
Thank you. Have a nice day!
